fixed.market_context: AI synthetic user x design thinking x user research SaaS
fixed.product_category: B2B SaaS for AI pre-validation and research scoping
fixed.buyer_type: hands-on workflow user and possible team champion

preferred.location: Hong Kong or Singapore digital product environment
preferred.company_stage: small to mid-size digital product team
preferred.work_context: designs flows, messaging, and prototypes, and often has to justify why research should happen before build decisions lock in
preferred.research_maturity: moderate; knows research methods, but time and access to participants are constrained
current_workarounds: lightweight usability tests with a few participants
asking PMs or customer-facing teammates for proxy feedback
using AI to pressure-test copy and flows informally
core_attraction: can surface plausible objections before formal research begins
helps prepare better interview scripts and prototype tests
gives multiple user angles instead of one internal design opinion
core_objections: may worry the personas still feel too templated
may reject the product if outputs sound like generic AI copy critique
may worry stakeholders will misuse synthetic reactions as proof
questions_to_surface: Can this help me prepare better real research rather than replace it?
How distinct are these personas in actual objection style and decision logic?
Can I use this to test messaging and flow friction, not just broad ideas?
How do I explain the limits of this output to stakeholders?
preferred.trust_boundary: needs clear auditability, believable persona consistency, and outputs that connect lived context to concrete product reactions
preferred.pricing_sensitivity: moderate; more willing to pay if it saves research prep time or fits into an existing design workflow
preferred.retention_hypothesis: retains if it becomes a repeatable pre-research layer for new concepts, messaging explorations, and early design reviews
interview_focus: whether the platform feels workflow-native for design thinking
whether the output is better than internal critique alone
what makes the personas feel credible or fake
